items.name: session-startup
items.description: Standard procedure for beginning a new BRAIN session

steps.title: Load skill context
steps.instruction: Call get_skill_full for the active skill to load protocols, directives, and domain context

steps.title: Check pending tasks
steps.instruction: List tasks with status=active or status=pending to identify current work

items.name: session-shutdown
items.description: Standard procedure for ending a BRAIN session — capture context before it disappears

steps.title: Log activity
steps.instruction: Create activity log entries for all work completed during this session, including duration and energy ratings

steps.title: Update task statuses
steps.instruction: Mark completed tasks as done, update in-progress tasks with current state, defer blocked tasks with notes

steps.title: Write handoff notes
steps.instruction: Document anything the next session needs to know — decisions made, blockers hit, next steps planned

items.name: bug-discovery
items.description: Steps for handling bugs found during other work — log it, don't fix it

steps.title: File GitHub issue
steps.instruction: Create a GitHub issue with type, ticket context, description, severity, and suggested fix

steps.title: Assess severity
steps.instruction: Classify as Blocker, Major, Minor, or Cosmetic. Flag blockers to L immediately

items.name: agent-activation
items.description: Steps for activating a Foundry agent — load identity and context before starting work

steps.title: Pull CLAUDE.md
steps.instruction: Load the org-level and repo-specific CLAUDE.md from BRAIN artifacts tagged claude-md

steps.title: Load agent brief
steps.instruction: Read the agent's identity artifact and session brief to establish role and context

steps.title: Verify identity
steps.instruction: Confirm agent identity pointer matches the BRAIN project record and acknowledge role boundaries

items.name: release-pipeline
items.description: Steps for shipping a version — branch, test, PR, merge, deploy, verify

steps.title: Create release branch
steps.instruction: Branch from develop with naming convention release/vX.Y.Z

steps.title: Run full test suite
steps.instruction: Execute pytest with full coverage and ruff lint checks — all must pass

steps.title: Open pull request
steps.instruction: Create PR from release branch to main with full PR template filled out

steps.title: Merge and tag
steps.instruction: After approval, merge to main and create a git tag for the version

steps.title: Deploy and verify
steps.instruction: Deploy to production and verify health checks pass, key endpoints respond correctly
